column1: # PEP 440 exclusive-comparison conformance table (generated, not vendored):
# Generated as the cross product of 19 specifiers x 44
# ground truth. Focus: the `>`/`<` exclusion rules (post-releases and local
# versions of the spec'd version under `>`, pre-releases of the spec'd
# version under `<`) across pre/post/dev/local/epoch combinations that the
# hand-written upstream table in pep440_specifiers.tsv does not cover
# (found in review of Issue #350: differing pre-release phases, posts of
